mapper.sql: voice_code AS voiceCode, filename, extname, file_URL AS fileUrl, import_time AS importTime, update_time AS updateTime, file_path AS filePath, status, content_sha256 AS contentSha256, file_size AS fileSize, upload_id AS uploadId, original_zip_name AS originalZipName, operator
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${tableName} ( voice_code, filename, extname, file_URL, import_time, update_time, file_path, status, content_sha256, file_size, upload_id, original_zip_name, operator ) VALUES ( #{record.voiceCode}, #{record.filename}, #{record.extname}, #{record.fileUrl}, #{record.importTime}, #{record.updateTime}, #{record.filePath}, #{record.status}, #{record.contentSha256}, #{record.fileSize}, #{record.uploadId}, #{record.originalZipName}, #{record.operator} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ${tableName} WHERE content_sha256 IS NULL OR file_size IS NULL OR file_size = 0 ORDER BY import_time ASC, voice_code ASC LIMIT #{limit}
